name: @visuelconcept/wui-para
description: PARA — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page: two tabs — a nested DP-type model editor (create/change-in-place/delete types) and an instances/values browser (live values + config attributes, create/rename/delete DPs). Embeds a proposal-only AI assistant (via /api/ai) and DPL ASCII import/export (multi-select DP/DPT) via the dplAscii MSA manager. Requires the PARA REST route to mutate.

routes: /api/para/* (datapoint/type engineering — ParaRoute; required for any mutation, no offline fallback)
/api/para/dpl/* (DPL ASCII import/export — bridges to the dplAscii MSA manager / WCCOAasciiSQLite)
managers: dplAscii (MSA service DplAscii — DPL export/import via WCCOAasciiSQLite)
